reforms.description: The government introduced a system of incentives based on interest subsidies and tax rebates to stimulate investment in both public and private enterprises.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The incentives are designed to encourage investment, which can lead to increased productivity and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The introduction of a system of incentives based on interest subsidies and tax rebates for both public and private enterprise.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant change in investment policy aimed at stimulating economic activity, though it is not a complete overhaul of the system.
reforms.source_quote: The investment policy is based on a steep increase in general government capital expenditure and on the introduction of a system of incentives based on interest subsidies and tax rebates for both public and private enterprise.
